_comment: Duplicate file name for blueprint compatibility — content mirrors joy_templates.json

templates.title: General monitoring
templates.body: These signals come from your wearable and logs. They are not a medical diagnosis. Use them as context alongside how you feel day to day.

templates.title: Watch-tier disclaimer
templates.body: Not medical advice — patterns changed enough to monitor closely. If symptoms worsen or you feel unwell, contact a clinician. [[JOY_WATCH_V1]]

templates.title: Urgent-tier disclaimer
templates.body: This is urgent safety context based on thresholds, not a diagnosis. Seek immediate medical care / emergency services if you have severe symptoms, chest pain, trouble breathing, fainting, or other emergencies. [[JOY_URGENT_V1]]
